comment.body:
I have som trouble to understand this in the first paragraph in the weekly letter. 
To grab liquidity in this bullish market, I think we should at least go lower in the range, but now it feels as we are making an upward stabilization. 
But maybe I'm reading it wrong and we are after all only on Monday. But it feels as if we go up tomorrow too, then we may only go down towards the gap from today. 
Maybe I just have to sit and wait
